overall.description: A nighttime drive through a futuristic cyberpunk city featuring massive curved overpasses with glowing cyan lights and towering neon-lit skyscrapers. The vehicle travels beneath the elevated highways toward a brightly lit digital plaza, navigating through light traffic in a high-fidelity game engine environment.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives straight beneath a massive curved overpass in a futuristic city at night. Neon-lit skyscrapers rise on the left while the road stretches ahead toward a distant digital plaza, with the overpass structure dominating the upper frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: curving highway approach to digital plaza

events.description: black sedan overtakes the ego vehicle on the right side

agents.ego_description: maintaining speed while the road begins curving right toward the plaza

segments.scene_description: As the road curves gently to the right, a black sedan overtakes on the right side. The elevated overpass shifts to the left of the frame while the digital plaza structure grows larger ahead, with palm trees becoming visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit digital plaza with holographic advertising displays

navigating a right turn through the intersection with other vehicles

tall pillars with large glowing advertisements flanking the road
palm trees silhouetted against the neon lights near the plaza

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a dazzling digital plaza surrounded by massive holographic advertisements on pillars. After passing beneath the overpass, the scene opens wide as the camera navigates a right turn through the intersection, sharing the road with a yellow compact car and a silver sports car amidst the neon-lit environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a futuristic nighttime city that transitions from the shadow of massive overpasses into the brilliance of a digital plaza. It begins with the vehicle traveling straight beneath a towering curved overpass, flanked by neon-lit skyscrapers that loom over the road. As the path curves gently to the right, a black sedan overtakes the vehicle while the overpass shifts toward the left of the frame, revealing distant palm trees and the growing silhouette of a plaza ahead. The scene then opens wide as the vehicle passes under the final stretch of the overpass and enters a dazzling intersection filled with massive holographic advertisements on pillars. Finally, the camera navigates a right turn through the neon-lit environment, weaving through traffic alongside a yellow compact car and a silver sports car.
